overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through Los Santos from a residential area with stone walls into a commercial district with palm trees, crossing multiple intersections with traffic lights and interacting with pedestrians waiting at crosswalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with stone retaining walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along residential sidewalk past trash bins and stone walls

entered.detail: gray stone retaining wall with residential house behind
three black garbage bins lined up on the sidewalk
mature deciduous trees providing shade over the sidewalk
well-maintained grass verge between sidewalk and street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a quiet residential sidewalk bordered by stone walls and mature trees. The area is sparsely populated with no visible pedestrians or traffic, creating a calm suburban atmosphere before transitioning to the commercial district ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with restaurant and palm trees

events.description: crosses from residential sidewalk into commercial street with palm trees and restaurant signage
yellow taxi passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: crosses the first intersection and continues walking along the commercial sidewalk toward the next crosswalk

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving along the commercial street

entered.detail: tall commercial sign for Wok restaurant with red lettering
tall California palm trees lining the commercial street
modern commercial structures with glass and concrete facades

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from residential to commercial, crossing an intersection with the Wok restaurant sign visible ahead. Palm trees line the street as a yellow taxi passes by, and the character continues along the busier sidewalk toward the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with traffic signal and gas station

events.description: stops at crosswalk corner to wait for pedestrian signal
pedestrian signal changes from red hand to walk, character begins crossing

agents.ego_description: waits at the corner with a group of pedestrians for the traffic light to change, then crosses the intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in colorful dress with red hair waiting at crosswalk
pedestrian in bright yellow shirt waiting and gesturing

entered.detail: traffic signal pole with red hand indicating stop
76 gas station with orange ball logo visible across the intersection
white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a busy intersection corner, joining a group of pedestrians waiting for the signal. The 76 gas station is visible across the street. After waiting, the signal changes and the character crosses the wide intersection with other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and parked cars

events.description: completes crossing and continues along opposite sidewalk with storefronts

agents.ego_description: walks along the commercial sidewalk passing various storefronts and parked vehicles

entered.detail: row of commercial shops with awnings and signage including a law office
white SUV and other vehicles parked along the curb
yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the curb

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character continues down the opposite sidewalk lined with commercial storefronts and parked cars. The area features mature street trees providing shade and a yellow fire hydrant near the curb, maintaining the urban commercial atmosphere of Los Santos.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character travels from a quiet residential neighborhood into a bustling urban commercial district. It begins along a calm suburban sidewalk bordered by stone walls and mature trees, moving steadily forward until the environment shifts toward a busier streetscape. As the character enters the commercial zone, the scene opens up to reveal palm trees and a Wok restaurant sign while a yellow taxi passes by. The camera then follows the character to a crowded intersection corner where they wait with a group of pedestrians before crossing the wide street toward a 76 gas station. Finally, the movement continues along a sidewalk lined with commercial storefronts, parked cars, and shaded street trees, passing a yellow fire hydrant as the urban atmosphere fully takes hold.
